rules: Always keep exactly 20 general-purpose background subagents busy on this project.
When any finish, immediately spawn replacements until 20 are running.
Prefer concrete code/UI/API/deploy/test tasks — no idle planning-only agents.
UI rule: Ant Design Cards/containers, centered max-width page shells.
Product rule: auto-chain prompt→task→delegate→monitor→complete stays intact.
task_pool: Deploy production: vercel --prod --yes from project root; verify health.
PageShell + AppLayout centered container (aba-page-center / aba-page-shell / aba-box).
global.css polish for boxed centered layout; mobile safe.
Dashboard.jsx: all content in Ant Design Cards.
Agents.jsx: list + spawn UI in Cards.
Meetings.jsx + MeetingRoom.jsx: Card containers, empty states.
TasksBoard.jsx: columns as Cards; goal-chain tags.
Hierarchy.jsx: tree/list in Cards.
Billing.jsx + PlanCards: centered boxed plans.
Login.jsx: centered Card form.
Settings.jsx + Profile.jsx: section Cards.
Business.jsx + Ops.jsx: tables inside Cards.
AgentChat.jsx: message list + composer in bordered panels; goal_chain alert.
task_chain.py + execute_goal skill + chat auto-chain + task_runner rollup verify/fix.
plans.py trial: 10 agents, 2 companies if not already.
ops.py: autonomy tick-all GET+POST with secret.
Frontend npm run build; fix compile errors.
Live smoke: demo login, templates, agents, meetings, chat goal chain.
Browser e2e agent A: node scripts/live_browser_e2e.mjs --agent=A
Browser e2e agent B: node scripts/live_browser_e2e.mjs --agent=B
create_test_account.py trial + orchestrator + save .demo_token
docs/AUTO_CHAIN.md keep accurate.
schema_migrate parent_task_id meeting_id verify.
agent_skills announce_plan hierarchy assign children.
AUTONOMY_MAX_TASKS_PER_TICK >= 3 verify.
TokenMeter + TopUpModal polish in Cards.
Templates.jsx page Card layout.
Workspace.jsx Card layout.
Subscribe.jsx centered plan boxes.
Fix any TypeError/runtime from recent UI edits.
